title: Simply Improved
description: Minecraft's textures and models but spiced up!
body:
![example of a simple house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K4qmeRui/images/0c17a22ff20bc5bbef253077179dec006ce4bc9d.png)

![example of underwater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K4qmeRui/images/288c5e876acc2315b35035b759a33361630eb8a0.png)


Description 

If you love Minecraft but want to spice up your game with some amazing visuals, you should use Simply Improved. This resource pack transforms your world with stunning models and textures for both overworld and nether creatures. You'll see new details and animations for mobs, animals, blocks and more. You'll also enjoy the revamped look of blocks and items, from Cactus to Anvil. Simply Improved is the perfect way to enhance your Minecraft experience without changing the core look of it.


Requirements for OptiFine: Custom Entity Models, Random Entities, Connected Texture, and Emissive Textures.

Simply Improved © 2023 by HydraLxck is licensed under All Rights Reserved.

Want to know why the licence has changed? Due to this project being discontinued I might be using assets here for other projects that might be better, so for originality, the licence is changing to All Rights Reserved. If you have used my assets when the licence was the custom one. Please message me, so I can discuss whether you can keep it.

Does this mean the pack is dead forever? Not entirely, I might still release updates. These updates will probably not follow themes like the old ones, but will just be a random improvements and additions in one update. So you can still expect this pack to receive updates in the future until further notice :).
